title: peucedanum kingii var. alpina
intro: Peucedanum kingii var. alpina, also known as Chinese angelica, is a variety of flowering plant in the carrot family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Peucedanum kingii var. alpina include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
